Oxygen_Bladder.description: A simple airtight vessel for storing extra oxygen.

Organic_Resin.description: A natural and highly flexible bonding agent.

Oxite.description: Can be refined into breathable oxygen.
Oxite.flavorText: A stable water-oxygen matrix, oxite slowly decomposes when exposed to the atmosphere of Icarus.

Oxygen_Tank.description: A small tank for storing and consuming oxygen.
Oxygen_Tank.flavorText: While plants and animals were genetically adjusted to deal with the impurities in Icarus\'s air, humans need to bring their own.

Kit_Oxite_Dissolver.description: A more efficient oxidizer for processing oxite into oxygen.
Kit_Oxite_Dissolver.flavorText: Place oxite and an appropriate container into the dissolver to start filling it. Requires sulfur for fuel.

Oxygen_Bladder_Full.description: A simple airtight vessel for storing extra oxygen.

Oxygen_Tank_Full.description: A small tank for storing and consuming oxygen.
Oxygen_Tank_Full.flavorText: While plants and animals were genetically adjusted to deal with the impurities in Icarus\'s air, humans need to bring their own.

Basic_Oxite_Dissolver.description: A simple device for processing oxite into oxygen.
Basic_Oxite_Dissolver.flavorText: The oxidizer is a slow, unpowered device that uses mechanical pressure to crush oxite, then store the resulting oxygen. Once the balloon begins to fill, consume oxygen from it directly.

Paste_Oxygen_Buff.description: A natural concoction that increases available oxygen.
Paste_Oxygen_Buff.flavorText: Your parents are a long way from here. What you do with your body is your business.

Paste_Oxygen_Consumption.flavorText: This preparation reduces the heart rate, dropping oxygen consumption temporarily.

Paste_Oxygen_Restore.description: An organic co-factor that rapidly restores oxygen.

Meta_Oxygen_Gel.description: Agrizero\'s patented gel supplement lowers the heart rate, reducing oxygen consumption.
Meta_Oxygen_Gel.flavorText: Largely illegal on Earth, indispensible among the stars.

Mission_Analyzer_Egg.description: Scans and locates nearby organic matter of the same type.
Mission_Analyzer_Egg.flavorText: Another machine designed by a scientist who has never stepped foot on Icarus.

Obsidian.description: Glass formed from the belly of the earth, as chunks of solid lava.
Obsidian.flavorText: Very popular for use in both weapons and jewellery.

Exotic_Processor.description: A machine that can process Volatile Exotics into usable materials.
Exotic_Processor.flavorText: You probably should still keep a good distance from this thing.

Exotic_Delivery_Interface.description: Allows you to order a Delivery Pod for Exotic Retrieval
Exotic_Delivery_Interface.flavorText: Part of the Icarus Orbital Exchange System developed by Sinotai.

Fish_03.description: A common saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_03.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_04_Var3.description: A common saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_04_Var3.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_09_Var2.description: An uncommon freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_09_Var2.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_14_Var2.description: A rare freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_14_Var2.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Geode_Lamp_Cut_Oxite.description: A gorgeous raw geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Cut_Oxite.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Burst_Oxite.description: A gorgeous cluster geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Burst_Oxite.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Monolith_Oxite.description: A gorgeous monolith geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Monolith_Oxite.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Obsidian_Axe.description: A lightweight Axe created with a sharpened head of Obsidian. Gives a chance to collect coal from trees.
Obsidian_Axe.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Obsidian_Pickaxe.description: A lightweight Pickaxe created with a sharpened point of Obsidian. Gives a chance to instantly smelt ore when mining.
Obsidian_Pickaxe.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Obsidian_Knife.description: A lightweight knife created with a sharpened blade of Obsidian. Gives a chance for food to be instantly cooked when skinning.
Obsidian_Knife.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Obsidian_Spear.description: A lightweight spear created with a sharpened point of Obsidian.
Obsidian_Spear.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Obsidian_Sickle.description: A lightweight sickle created with a sharpened blade of Obsidian. Gives a chance to cook veges when harvesting but may also produce spoiled plants.
Obsidian_Sickle.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Obsidian_Sledgehammer.description: A lightweight hammer created with a blunted block of Obsidian. Gives a chance to instantly smelt ore when mining.
Obsidian_Sledgehammer.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Obsidian_Bolt.description: A lightweight bolt created with a sharpened point of Obsidian.
Obsidian_Bolt.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Obsidian_Arrow.description: A lightweight arrow created with a sharpened point of Obsidian.
Obsidian_Arrow.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Obsidian_Throwing_Knife.description: A lightweight throwing knife created with a sharpened blade of Obsidian.
Obsidian_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Obsidian_Throwing_Spear.description: An aerodynamic spear created with a sharpened point of Obsidian.
Obsidian_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Obsidian_Head.description: A durable piece of armor that provides a fair level of resistance against fire and heat.
Obsidian_Head.flavorText: Proof that anything can be salvaged for use on Icarus.

Obsidian_Arms.description: A durable piece of armor that provides a fair level of resistance against fire and heat.
Obsidian_Arms.flavorText: Proof that anything can be salvaged for use on Icarus.

Obsidian_Chest.description: A durable piece of armor that provides a fair level of resistance against fire and heat.
Obsidian_Chest.flavorText: Proof that anything can be salvaged for use on Icarus.

Obsidian_Legs.description: A durable piece of armor that provides a fair level of resistance against fire and heat.
Obsidian_Legs.flavorText: Proof that anything can be salvaged for use on Icarus.

Obsidian_Feet.description: A durable piece of armor that provides a fair level of resistance against fire and heat.
Obsidian_Feet.flavorText: Proof that anything can be salvaged for use on Icarus.

Oxite_Ore_Stack_100.description: Can be refined into breathable oxygen.
Oxite_Ore_Stack_100.flavorText: A stable water-oxygen matrix, oxite slowly decomposes when exposed to the atmosphere of Icarus.

Water_Trough_Fountain.description: Allows multiple creatures to drink from at once and can be connected to a water network.
Water_Trough_Fountain.flavorText: Who says creatures can\'t drink with style?

Animal_Feed_High_Quality.description: Created in the Ranching Station. When fed to animals, increases food effectiveness and provides all-round bonuses.

Cat_Head_A2.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Cat_Head_A2.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Cat_Trophy_A2.description: A preserved memory of your feline friend.

Obsidian_Stack_100.description: Glass formed from the belly of the earth, as chunks of solid lava.
Obsidian_Stack_100.flavorText: Very popular for use in both weapons and jewellery.

Mission_Organic_Analyzer.description: A device which will Analyze Organic Samples.
